title: 7 Celebrities' Favorite Herbal Cream Remedies for Glowing Skin
description: Silybum marianum creams contain a plant extract called silymarin, which is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Silymarin also has been shown to improve skin elasticity, giving the skin a smoother and more even tone.
